config.title: Opcje wydruku #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
' messageBoxEx #include "50122" dim DocConfigCopy ' kopia referencji ' Przy otwarciu dialogu jest to domyślna drukarka lub wybrana przez użytkownika ' Przy wybieraniu drukarki staje się drukarką wybraną z listy ' Przy zapisaniu opcji z dialogu wartość zależy od pola w radio ' "DEFAULT" : domyślna drukarka ' "" : zawsze pytaj ' "HPXXX" : drukarka z listy dim SelectedPrinter dim OriginalSelectedPrinter ' kopia wartości podanej ' dodaje element do listy sub AddListItem(ByRef pSO,ByVal caption, ByVal id) pSO.write "" pSO.write "" pSO.write caption + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + vbNewLine end sub ' tworzy dialog z listą do wyboru function SelectItemFromStringList(ByRef stringlist,ByVal caption) dim pSO set pSO=doc_.createstreamobj() pSO.write "" pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + caption + "" pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "
" pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + vbNewLine dim id for id = 0 to ubound(stringlist) AddListItem pSO, stringlist(id), id + 1 next pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "
" + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + vbNewLine pSO.write "" + vbNewLine dim pHli set pHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE") set pHli.prop(GVAR_DESTPAGE)=pSO.getstream() dim pPage set pPage=doc_.getpagehli(pHli) SelectItemFromStringList = 0 if (not pPage is nothing) then SelectItemFromStringList = pPage.domodalauto() end if end function function GetPrinterNameList() Dim oPrinting : set oPrinting = doc_.system.activex("navoperif.printing") GetPrinterNameList = Split(oPrinting.printers, vbTab) end function function UpdatePrinterNameEdit() dim control : set control = page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_PRINTER_EDIT) dim printers : printers = GetPrinterNameList() dim iter for iter = 0 to ubound(printers) if SelectedPrinter = printers(iter) then control.text = SelectedPrinter exit function end if next SelectedPrinter = GetDefaultPrinterName() control.text = GetDefaultPrinterName() end function ' pokazuje dialog wyboru drukarki z listy sub SelectPrinterFromList ' get list of printers dim printers : printers = GetPrinterNameList() dim result : result = SelectItemFromStringList(printers,"Wybierz drukarkę") if result > 0 then SelectedPrinter = printers(result - 1) UpdatePrinterNameEdit() else SelectPrinterFromList = SelectedPrinter end if end sub ''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' ''''''''' Zdarzenia (kliknięcia / zmiany wyboru) '''''''' ''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' function UpdateAllOnChoosePrinterChange(byval newValue) dim disabled : disabled = true if newValue = RADIO_OPTION_EDIT then disabled = false end if ' jeśli opcja "WYBIERZ" to włącz przycisk i edit page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_PRINTER_EDIT).disable = disabled page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_PRINTER_BUTTON).disable = disabled ' pozostałe kontrolki radio ' Jeśli ma się pytać za każdym razem o drukarkę to nie ma ' sensu udostępniać opcji, o które i tak będzie się później pytał disabled = false if newvalue = RADIO_OPTION_ASK_EVERY_TIME then disabled = true end if page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_ORIENTATION).disable = disabled page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_QUALITY).disable = disabled page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_LICZBA_KOPII).disable = disabled page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_FORMAT).disable = disabled EnableChooseFormatRadioOptions not disabled EnableChooseColorModeRadio not disabled page_.ctrl(BOOL_PRINT_BACKGROUND).disable = disabled end function function c##CHOOSE_PRINTER##_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) : c##CHOOSE_PRINTER##_ondataentered = true UpdateAllOnChoosePrinterChange(newValue) end function ' empty function c##CHOOSE_PRINTER##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CHOOSE_PRINTER##_ongetdata=true end function function EnableChooseFormatRadioOptions(byval enabled) dim disabled : disabled = true dim control : set control = page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_FORMAT) if not control.disable then if control.value = PAGE_FORMAT_OPTION_CUSTOM then disabled = not enabled end if end if page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_FORMAT_WIDTH).disable = disabled page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_FORMAT_LENGTH).disable = disabled end function ' Format papieru - opcje do rozmiarów dostępne gdy zaznaczono "Inne" function c##CHOOSE_FORMAT##_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) : c##CHOOSE_FORMAT##_ondataentered = true dim disabled : disabled = true if not oCtrl.disable then if newValue = PAGE_FORMAT_OPTION_CUSTOM then disabled = false end if end if EnableChooseFormatRadioOptions(not disabled) end function 'empty function c##CHOOSE_FORMAT##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CHOOSE_FORMAT##_ongetdata=true end function sub EnableChooseColorModeRadio(byval enabled) dim control : set control = page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_COLORMODE) dim disabled : disabled = not enabled dim subcontrols_disabled : subcontrols_disabled = true if not disabled then if control.value = CHOOSE_COLORMODE_OPTION_BW then subcontrols_disabled = false end if end if control.disable = disabled page_.ctrl(BOOL_GRAYSCALE).disable = subcontrols_disabled end sub ' kiedy kontrola "odcienie szarości" jest dostępna function c##CHOOSE_COLORMODE##_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) : c##CHOOSE_COLORMODE##_ondataentered = true dim disabled : disabled = true if not oCtrl.disable then if newValue = CHOOSE_COLORMODE_OPTION_BW then disabled = false end if end if page_.ctrl(BOOL_GRAYSCALE).disable = disabled end function ' empty function c##CHOOSE_COLORMODE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CHOOSE_COLORMODE##_ongetdata=true end function function GetDefaultPrinterName Dim oPrinting set oPrinting = doc_.system.activex("navoperif.printing") GetDefaultPrinterName = oPrinting.defaultprinter end function ''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' ''''''''' FORMAT PAPIERU '''''''''''''''''''''''''''' ''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' ' w docconfig jest numer stałej z DEVMODE (API) const DM_DEFAULT = -1 'default const DMPAPER_A4 = 9 ' A4 210 x 297 mm const DMPAPER_A5 = 11 ' A5 148 x 210 mm const DMPAPER_B5 = 13 ' B5 (JIS) 182 x 257 mm const DMPAPER_ENV_DL = 27 ' Envelope DL 110 x 220mm const DMPAPER_ENV_10 = 20 ' Envelope #10 4 1/8 x 9 1/2 const PAPER_CUSTOM = 0 ' use specified dim format_types set format_types = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() format_types.Add DM_DEFAULT format_types.Add DMPAPER_A4 format_types.Add DMPAPER_A5 format_types.Add DMPAPER_B5 format_types.Add DMPAPER_ENV_DL format_types.Add DMPAPER_ENV_10 format_types.Add PAPER_CUSTOM ' docconfig.paper_format -> radio.value function FormatIDToRadioSelection(byval formatid) FormatIDToRadioSelection = 0 ' nie odnaleziono - nie zaznaczaj nic dim i for i = 0 to format_types.Count() - 1 if CLng(format_types.Value(i)) = CLng(formatid) then FormatIDToRadioSelection = i + 1 exit function end if next end function ' radio.value -> docconfig.paper_format function GetSelectedFormatID() dim radio_selection radio_selection = page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_FORMAT).value GetSelectedFormatID = format_types.Value(radio_selection - 1) end function function GetSelectionFromPrinterName(ByVal printer_name) if printer_name = "DEFAULT" then GetSelectionFromPrinterName = RADIO_OPTION_DEFAULT elseif printer_name = "" then GetSelectionFromPrinterName = RADIO_OPTION_ASK_EVERY_TIME else GetSelectionFromPrinterName = RADIO_OPTION_EDIT end if end function function GetPrinterIndexFromSelection(ByVal radio_selection) if radio_selection = RADIO_OPTION_DEFAULT then GetPrinterIndexFromSelection = "DEFAULT" elseif radio_selection = RADIO_OPTION_ASK_EVERY_TIME then GetPrinterIndexFromSelection = "" else if SelectedPrinter = "" then GetPrinterIndexFromSelection = GetDefaultPrinterName() else GetPrinterIndexFromSelection = SelectedPrinter end if end if end function ''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' '''''''' LoadFromDocConfig - wczytuje ustawienia z podanego obiektu ''''' ''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' ' trzeba zawołać z zewnątrz przed domodalauto, żeby przekazać ustawienia domyślne function LoadFromDocConfig( ByRef docconfig, ByRef selection_mode ) set DocConfigCopy = docconfig 'remember for SaveToDocConfig SelectedPrinter = selection_mode OriginalSelectedPrinter = selection_mode UpdatePrinterNameEdit() dim value : value = CLng(GetSelectionFromPrinterName(selection_mode)) page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_PRINTER).value = value page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_COLORMODE).value = CLng(docconfig.colormode + 1) UpdateAllOnChoosePrinterChange(value) page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_ORIENTATION).value = CLng(docconfig.orientation + 1) page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_QUALITY).value = CLng(docconfig.quality + 1) page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_LICZBA_KOPII).value = CLng(docconfig.copies) page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_FORMAT).value = CLng(FormatIDToRadioSelection(docconfig.paperformat)) page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_FORMAT_WIDTH).value = CCur(docconfig.width/1000) page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_FORMAT_LENGTH).value = CCur(docconfig.length/1000) if docconfig.monograyscale then page_.ctrl(BOOL_GRAYSCALE).value = "1" else page_.ctrl(BOOL_GRAYSCALE).value = "0" end if if docconfig.printbackground then page_.ctrl(BOOL_PRINT_BACKGROUND).value = "1" else page_.ctrl(BOOL_PRINT_BACKGROUND).value = "0" end if end function function GetSelectionMode() GetSelectionMode = OriginalSelectedPrinter end function function SaveToDocConfig() SaveToDocConfig = false SelectedPrinter = GetPrinterIndexFromSelection(page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_PRINTER).value) OriginalSelectedPrinter = SelectedPrinter DocConfigCopy.orientation = page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_ORIENTATION).value - 1 DocConfigCopy.quality = page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_QUALITY).value - 1 DocConfigCopy.copies = page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_LICZBA_KOPII).value ' najpierw width i length, potem dopiero paperformat ' bo ustawianie width i length przełącza paperformat DocConfigCopy.width = CLng(page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_FORMAT_WIDTH).value * 1000.0) DocConfigCopy.length = CLng(page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_FORMAT_LENGTH).value * 1000.0) DocConfigCopy.paperformat = GetSelectedFormatID() DocConfigCopy.colormode = page_.ctrl(CHOOSE_COLORMODE).value - 1 DocConfigCopy.monograyscale = (page_.ctrl(BOOL_GRAYSCALE).value = "1") DocConfigCopy.printbackground = (page_.ctrl(BOOL_PRINT_BACKGROUND).value = "1") SaveToDocConfig = true end function function fsave() dim bResult bResult = SaveToDocConfig() if bResult then fsave = true page_.goback else fsave = false end if end function function fok() if not fsave() then fok = false else fok = true page_.goback end if end function function fcancel() page_.goback fcancel = true end function

page.body:
Drukarka:
Domyślna
ABCD
Wybierz ...
Pytaj za każdym razem
Orientacja papieru:
Domyślnie Pionowa Pozioma
Jakość wydruku
Domyślna Wysoka Średnia Niska Robocza
Liczba kopii :
Format papieru
Domyślny PAGE_FORMAT_OPTION1 PAGE_FORMAT_OPTION2 PAGE_FORMAT_OPTION3 PAGE_FORMAT_OPTION4 PAGE_FORMAT_OPTION5
Inny :
szerokość w cm:
wysokość w cm:
Ustawienia kolorów
Domyślnie Wydruk kolorowy
Wydruk czarno-biały
Odcienie szarości
Drukuj tło
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
